required_skill_areas.pre_sales: This role also includes up to 50% travel to meet with customers, support sales engagements

evidence.primary_role_motion: You deploy Deepgram’s voice AI platform into complex restaurant environments and make it work in the real world.
evidence.deployment_environment: Deepgram’s voice-native foundation models are accessed through cloud APIs or as self-hosted and on-premises software
evidence.target_customer_industry: Forward Deployed Engineer, Deepgram for Restaurants
evidence.travel_requirement: This role also includes up to 50% travel to meet with customers, support sales engagements
evidence.ai_ml_depth: You are comfortable working across APIs, SDKs, webhooks, cloud infrastructure, and customer tech stacks.
evidence.customer_engagement_depth: You embed with enterprise restaurant brands and restaurant technology partners, learn their systems deeply, and integrate our platform into the core of their operations.
evidence.target_user_persona: You partner closely with Sales, Product, and Engineering, but you are just as comfortable on a customer’s Slack channel walking their team through an API integration.
evidence.solution_customization_level: Adapt and configure Deepgram’s platform to meet each customer’s unique operational requirements — menu structures, ordering flows, POS integrations, edge cases, and everything in between.
